notes: PR106 r2 + PR101 ranked-Huffman/no-op grammar variant (format_id=0x02). Saves 42 bytes net (575->527 sidecar payload + 6B framing overhead) vs the format_id=0x01 brotli sidecar baseline. The dim/delta_q arrays reconstructed by decode_ranked_no_op_sidecar are bit-identical to the brotli-decoded version (SHA a55bd9bdecb4a462... / 616ee8fbee1e4770...), so HNeRV decoder behavior is unchanged by construction. Local smoke (CPU, same-device cross-format comparison) confirms inflate output is byte-identical between format_id=0x01 and format_id=0x02. score_claim=false here because the contest-CUDA score will be re-measured via Modal T4 dispatch (lane_pr106_latent_sidecar_r2_pr101_grammar_20260511T180000Z). The actual score lives in contest_auth_eval.json with promotion_eligible=false until the gate passes.
